title: Dark Eye (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Dark Eye''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It attempted to reinforce the [[System Patrol Squadron]] above [[Farfeld II]]. However, it was attacked by another frigate, the ''[[Melisse]]'', which had [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] and assistance from Rebel ace [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]].

The ''Dark Eye'' was eventually destroyed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
